notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Curtis Mead. Matt Chapman to 3rd. Rafael Devers out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.
